ui_response.ui_state: Sent '한글날', chat returned to idle ('AI로 무엇이든 시도해 보세요...') with no response or error displayed to user.

response_body.name: ContentPolicyError
response_body.message: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

path_narrowing_verification.comparison_with_build5: Build #5 intercepted ALL requests (path '/'), causing connection_error. Build #6 only blocks runInferenceTranscript.

console_state.note: Pre-existing Notion errors, not related to APF interception

diagnosis.pattern: 403 Forbidden with JSON body delivered successfully, but Notion frontend does not render the error message to user. Chat silently returns to idle.
diagnosis.comparison_with_build5: Build #5: ALL Notion API calls blocked (path '/') → connection_error. Build #6: Only AI endpoint blocked → site works normally, but warning still not shown.
diagnosis.root_cause: Notion's frontend catches the 403 error from runInferenceTranscript but does not display the error message or body content to the user. It silently fails and returns the chat to idle state.
action_needed: Path narrowing is confirmed working - this is a major win
Warning display requires different approach: 403 JSON body is ignored by Notion frontend
Options: (1) Return 200 with error in SSE/ndjson stream format that Notion renders, (2) Inject warning via different mechanism
Notion expects ndjson (Accept: application/x-ndjson) - consider returning 200 with warning in ndjson format
